pageContext.name: Gunnar
pageContext.description: 'When the veil between worlds is the thinnest, The Ghosts of Halloween can be seen…'  Sideshow and Trick or Treat Studios are proud to present the haunting work of William Paquet with the creepy and unsettling Gunnar Collectible Statue.  The Ghosts of Halloween collection features original creations inspired by chilling photographs of children in their Halloween costumes from a bygone era.  This resin statue features a grayscale paint scheme and is presented on a themed base. Gunnar statue including the stand measures approximately 16' tall and comes in a beautiful collectors box.
